description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build, review, staging, and production. Add a build job in the build stage that runs on tags nginx, review-apps, deploy, executes "echo Build my page", and stores the public directory as an artifact that expires in 1 hour. Add a review job in the review stage that runs on all branches except master, creates a review environment named review/$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME with URL http://$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG.$APPS_DOMAIN, executes "rsync -av --delete public /srv/nginx/pages/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG", and can be stopped by a manual stop_review job. Add a staging job in the staging stage that runs only on master, creates a staging environment with URL http://staging.$APPS_DOMAIN, and runs "rsync -av --delete public /srv/nginx/pages/staging" on the same tags. Add a production job in the production stage that runs only on master, creates a production environment with URL http://production.$APPS_DOMAIN, runs "rsync -av --delete public /srv/nginx/pages/production", is manual, and uses the same tags. Finally, add a stop_review job in the review stage that manually stops the review environment, runs "rm -rf public /srv/nginx/pages/$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG", sets GIT_STRATEGY to none, and runs on the same tags.
